memberdef.argsstring: (BaseCredentials const &InCredentialsRef, BaseSettings const &InSettingsRef, FHttpRetrySchedulerBase &InHttpRef)

briefdescription.para: Basic HTTP request.

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

Callback when HTTP call is error.

briefdescription.para: Basic HTTP request.

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content form key-value (implies Content-Type application/x-www-form-urlencoded header).
HTTP request headers key-value (overrides implicit headers).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

HTTP request URL.
HTTP request based on JSON object.

HTTP request headers key-value (overrides implicit headers).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, TMap< FString, FString > const &Data, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content form key-value (implies Content-Type application/x-www-form-urlencoded header).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, FString const &Json, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content JSON string (implies Content-Type application/json header).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, TSharedRef< FJsonObject > const &Json, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content JSON Object.
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, T const &UStruct, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError, bool bOmitBlankValues=false)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content from a given UStruct (implies Content-Type application/json header).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.
Flag that will remove blank string values from the JSON string sent to the server. Defaults to false.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, T const &UStruct, TMap< FString, FString > &Headers, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError, bool bOmitBlankValues=false)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content from a given UStruct (implies Content-Type application/json header).
HTTP request headers key-value (overrides implicit headers).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.
Flag that will remove blank string values from the JSON string sent to the server. Defaults to false.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, TSharedPtr< FJsonObject > const &JsonObject, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError, bool bOmitBlankValues=false)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content as JSON object.
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.
Flag that will remove blank string values from the JSON string sent to the server. Defaults to false.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, TArray< uint8 > const &Content, TMap< FString, FString > &Headers, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content byte array (implies Content-Type application/octet-stream header).
HTTP request headers key-value (overrides implicit headers).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, TMap< FString, FString > const &Data, TMap< FString, FString > &Headers, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content form key-value (implies Content-Type application/x-www-form-urlencoded header).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, FString const &Json, TMap< FString, FString > &Headers, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError)
memberdef.name: ApiRequest

briefdescription.para: API request with credentials access token (if available).

parameterdescription.para: HTTP request methods, e.g. GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE.
HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content JSON string (implies Content-Type application/json header).
HTTP request headers key-value (overrides implicit headers).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.

memberdef.argsstring: (FString const &Verb, FString const &Url, FHttpFormData const &QueryParams, TSharedPtr< FJsonObject > JsonObject, TMap< FString, FString > &Headers, U const &OnSuccess, V const &OnError, bool bOmitBlankValues=false)

HTTP request URL.
HTTP request query string key-value.
HTTP request content as JSON Object.
HTTP request headers key-value (overrides implicit headers).
Callback when HTTP call is successful.
Callback when HTTP call is error.
